2606.21517.title: MedHal-Loc: Are "Explainable-by-Architecture" Medical Hallucination Detectors Faithful Localizers? A Localization Benchmark
2606.21517.paper_summary: Detecting hallucinations in clinical text is increasingly framed as an explainability problem: systems should not merely flag an unreliable response but point to the offending span. Architectures built around knowledge-graph (KG) triple decomposition are marketed for exactly this auditability, yet their localization ability is typically assumed rather than measured. We introduce MedHal-Loc, a benchmark and metric for localization faithfulness -- whether a detector's top-ranked error unit actually overlaps the erroneous span. The controlled subset comprises 300 PubMedQA-derived statements with single, span-level errors injected across four localizable types (entity substitution, relation error, mechanism misattribution, invention), yielding gold spans by construction; a complementary natural subset documents that real hallucinations are dominated by diffuse conclusion-flips that resist span localization (a human expert accepted 1/18 candidate spans). Evaluating four fine-grained paradigms, we find that NLI-per-clause, consistency-per-sentence, and the dedicated span detector FAVA all localize well above chance, whereas an elaborate KG-triple pipeline localizes no better than chance (+3.3pp, n.s.), bottlenecked by ~59% entity-extraction coverage -- despite competitive detection F1 (0.609). Detection competence does not imply faithful localization; architectural explainability must be validated, not presumed.
2606.21517.paper_summary_zh: 在臨床文本中檢測幻覺越來越被框架為一個可解釋性問題：系統不僅應該標記不可靠的回應，還應指向問題的範圍。圍繞知識圖譜（KG）三元組分解構建的架構正是為了這種可審計性而推廣，但它們的定位能力通常是被假設而不是測量的。我們引入了MedHal-Loc，一個針對定位忠實度的基準和指標——即檢測器的最高排名錯誤單元是否實際上與錯誤範圍重疊。受控子集包含300個來自PubMedQA的聲明，這些聲明在四種類型的可定位錯誤（實體替換、關係錯誤、機制錯誤歸因、發明）中注入了單一的範圍級錯誤，從而構建出金標範圍；一個補充的自然子集記錄了真實幻覺主要由抵抗範圍定位的擴散結論翻轉所主導（人類專家接受了18個候選範圍中的1個）。在評估四種細緻的範式時，我們發現NLI-per-clause、consistency-per-sentence和專用的範圍檢測器FAVA的定位效果均顯著高於隨機，而一個複雜的KG三元組管道的定位效果則不比隨機更好（+3.3pp，n.s.），其瓶頸在於約59%的實體提取覆蓋率——儘管檢測F1（0.609）具有競爭力。檢測能力並不意味著忠實的定位；架構的可解釋性必須經過驗證，而不是假定。
2606.21517.author: Minmin Chen et.al.
2606.21517.authors: Minmin Chen, Daojian Lu, Yining Dai, Jvyu Cai, Fengdan Chen
